PROOF OF SERVICE OF CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; PETITION TO CONFIRM CANTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD; NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONIFRM ARB AWARD; P&A IN SUPPORT; JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA SERVED JAN-18-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT KIRIKOV, VLADIMIR
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-22-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT KIRIKOV, VLADIMIR $10,611.18 PRINCIPAL, $345.95 INTEREST, $340.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,297.13, (SEE SCANNED DOC)
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY FORD, ANDREW

NTC OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA HEARING SET FOR FEB-22-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA'S NOTICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. MOVING PARTY PRESENTED A VALD PROOF OF SERVICE AS REQUESTED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189.

Ntc Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Ford, Esq.of Gordon and Wong, 650-583-9399 for petitioner and moving party Chase Manhattan Bank U.S.A.

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA'S Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. MOVING PARTY PRESENTED A VALD PROOF OF SERVICE AS REQUESTED IN THE TENTATIVE RULING. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
